reviews.review_description:
Controller required.

Puzzle/wand shooter that is surprisingly fun, especially for free.

ESL developer, that could use some more work.

Challenging does not even describe this game..it's down right hard! But in a good way..if you like puzzle vr game but with a twist this game is for you! But be prepared to get mad and really want to punch the little turds, that try and stop you, in the face with a chair! I did a vr game play on youtube of this game but you should download this game and try it yourself!
